items.title: Resume
items.content: Gurkirat Singh Ludhiana, Punjab, India gurkiratjap@gmail.com — LinkedIn — GitHub — LeetCode Education Guru Nanak Dev Engineering College (GNDEC), Ludhiana Expected 2028 B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering — CGPA: 8.0+/10.0 (Ongoing) Technical Skills Languages: C++, Python, TypeScript, HTML5, CSS3 Web Development: Next.js, Node.js, Tailwind CSS, REST APIs, Firebase, Supabase, Mon- goDB AI / ML: Scikit-learn, Pandas, Data Preprocessing, Classification Models Tools & Platforms: Git, GitHub, Linux, Vercel, Render Projects Heart Disease Detection Model Python, Scikit-learn, Pandas • Built a binary classification ML model to predict heart disease risk using clinical health data. • Applied data preprocessing and feature engineering to improve model performance. Career Choice Guidance System Next.js, TypeScript, Supabase • Developed afull-stack platformrecommending careerpaths based onuser skillsand interests. • Implemented authentication and real-time database management using Supabase. Smart Notes Finder Next.js, MongoDB, Tailwind CSS • Built a web application for organizing and searching academic notes. • Designed a responsive UI with efficient MongoDB-based storage. Certifications • Oracle Certified Foundations Associate – Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning • Microsoft × freeCodeCamp – Foundational C# Certification Hackathons & Competitions • Hackanauts (GNDEC): Collaborated in an on-campus hackathon to build solutions under strict deadlines. • GitGrade (Online): Built a GitHub profile analysis tool and showcased it in a version control challenge. • LeetCode DSA Practice: Regularly solving algorithmic problems to improve problem- solving skills. 1

items.title: ASSIGNMENT 1
items.content: ASSIGNMENT 1 1.1 What is Artificial Intelligence? Artificial Intelligence (AI) is a branch of computer science that focuses on creating machines and systems capable of performing tasks that normally require human intelligence. These tasks include learning from experience, reasoning, problem-solving, understanding natural language, perception, and decision-making. AI enables machines to mimic cognitive functions such as thinking, learning, and adapting. It is widely used in various applications like virtual assistants, recommendation systems, autonomous vehicles, and medical diagnosis. In simple terms, AI is the ability of a machine to behave like a human being and perform intelligent tasks efficiently.

These tasks include learning from experience, reasoning, problem-solving, understanding natural language, perception, and decision-making. In simple terms, AI is the ability of a machine to behave like a human being and perform intelligent tasks efficiently.
